title.en: Ye Tian came to Xuanlin Guman.

content.en:
Soon.

Ye Tian came to Xuanlin Guman.

Without saying a word, directly besiege this Xuanlin Ancient Vine.

The strength of the Xuanlin Ancient Vine is very strong, and the defense is strong, but Ye Tian's strength is also very strong, not inferior to the Xuanlin Ancient Vine, and multiple replica bodies are besieging together, completely dominating.

In this way, Ye Tian gradually crushed the Xuanlin Ancient Vine.

Finally, the Xuanlin Ancient Vine was beaten by Ye Tian and had no power to resist, and the vines shattered one by one.

In the end, the Xuanlin Ancient Vine was wiped out by Ye Tian, and he had no power to resist, and became an unconscious thing like an evil vine, which could only be controlled by Ye Tian.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian subdued the Xuanlin Ancient Vine, shrunk it, and held it in his hand.

Swish!

Ye Tian then explored this place, and after finding some good things, he left here and returned to the Endless Realm Alliance.

......

Endless Realms Alliance.

Ye Tian came back, and then began to study the Xuanlin Ancient Vine.

He found that the Xuanlin Ancient Vine not only helped to strengthen the Eternal Dao Species, but also helped to solidify the Eternal 26 Constant Dao Species.

It's just that its impact on the Eternal Dao Seed is even more terrifying, if it is another half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse, put it into the Eternal Dao Seed, I am afraid that it will not be long before it falls into the Demon Seed.

It also has no side effects on Ye Tian of the Perfect Eternal Dao Seed, but it is a supreme treasure.

Ye Tian also tried, and the Xuanlin Ancient Vine could increase the speed of the solidification of the Eternal Dao Seed a lot.

In this way, his Eternal Dao Seed solidified faster.

"That's right, the value of the Xuanlin Ancient Vine is very high!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Before you know it, another billion solstice years have passed.

During this period of time, the number of Eternal Dao Realms in the Endless Realm Alliance skyrocketed, and the number of Eternal Dao Realms who had cultivated the Eternal Dao Species also skyrocketed, and there were even many Eternal Dao Realms who had completed the Eternal Dao Body entry.

These are all the eternal realms opened up one by one, and there are more and more resources, and there are also a lot of resources in the Eternal Yin and Yang River, which is why the strength of the human race has skyrocketed so much.

"The eternal kingdom has reached two hundred!"

Ye Tian muttered.

During this period of time, the number of Terran lords was increasing, and he also transferred some of the positions of Eternal Lords to other Terran Eternal Dao Realms, after all, it was meaningless for him to ask for so many lords.

......

The Endless Realm Alliance, in a certain area, countless strange auras permeated the air.

Immediately afterward, the earth here shattered and gradually turned into an abyss of demon seeds.

Whoa!!!!

A celebrity clan Eternal Dao Realm came to this vicinity, but did not enter.

"It's the Demon Seed Abyss, I didn't expect that our Endless Realm Alliance hadn't opened up for long before the Demon Seed Abyss appeared!" An Eternal Dao Realm was shocked.

"Yes, we don't even have a demon seed here, why is there a demon seed abyss?" the other Eternal Dao Realm wondered.

It didn't take long.

Ye Xingchen came, went in and explored, and did not find the demon seed, but the demon seed abyss is indeed not suitable for the Eternal Dao Realm to enter.

There was nothing wrong with him, but for other Eternal Dao realms, once he had been in it for a long time, it would not be good.

A little more passed.

Ye Tian descended here.

"Father!" Ye Xingchen said respectfully.

Ye Tian took a look at the Demon Seed Abyss and said, "Xingchen, have you gone in and explored?"

"Father, after a brief exploration, it is not much different from the Demon Seed Abyss of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, but there is no Demon Seed in it. Ye Xingchen said.

"Not long after the Endless Realm Alliance was opened, the Demon Seed Abyss appeared. Moreover, in any Eternal Kingdom Alliance, there is a demon seed abyss, and it cannot be eliminated, it seems that the demon seed abyss contains a big secret!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"Father, what should I do with this Demon Seed Abyss now?" Ye Xingchen asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Xingchen responded.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian also personally went to the Demon Seed Abyss to explore, but nothing happened.

He actually still expects the Demon Seed Abyss to give birth to the Eternal Demon Pillar, so that he can obtain two Eternal Demon Pillars.

Unfortunately, it is impossible to conceive the Eternal Pillar now.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian didn't care about this demon seed abyss.

As a result, not too long years have passed.

A demon seed rushed from the death zone to the side of the Endless Realm Alliance, seemingly attracted by the demon seed abyss.

However, he was quickly intercepted by a Terran Eternal Dao Realm, and after a while, other Eternal Dao Realms quickly came and killed him.

After this incident, Ye Tian found a problem.

That is, more and more demon seeds are being attracted, and this situation has not appeared in the Alliance of the Kingdom of the Gods.

As a last resort, Ye Tiandu personally guarded the positions of the Endless Realm Alliance, but whenever there were powerful demon seeds, he would personally take action and kill them.

this day.

A half-step Eternal Realm Demon Seed was attracted, and Ye Tian intercepted the other party as soon as possible and killed him.

"Strange, why does the Endless Realm Alliance attract so many demon seeds?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

Is 650 the Demon Seed Abyss of the Endless Realm Alliance special?

No!

It must not be this reason, it must be something else.

"There are too many eternal realms in the Endless Realm!"

Ye Tian suddenly guessed this reason.

Compared to the Gods Alliance, the Endless Kingdom Alliance belongs to a large Eternal Kingdom Alliance, perhaps in the Death Zone, the more Eternal Kingdoms there are, the more demon seeds they attract.

And the Alliance of the Kingdom of the Gods has a lot of attraction to the demon seeds.

Just like a light bulb, one has a very low brightness and the other has a very high brightness, and the degree of attraction is completely different.

"It seems that we can't continue to increase the number of Eternal Realms, otherwise the Endless Realm Alliance has not yet developed and attracted a large number of Eternal Realm God Realm demon seeds, then even I can't intercept them!" Ye Tian muttered.

It is better to wait for his cultivation to break through to the Eternal Realm God Realm, and then cultivate his wife and children to the Eternal Realm God Realm, and then release more Eternal State Decrees.

And so.

Ye Tian revoked the Eternal State Order of the Terran Temple, and it was not allowed to be exchanged for the time being.

This news spread, making the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm who had hoped to exchange the Eternal State Decree and was still hesitant to regret it.

However, this order has already been given and it is unlikely to change it in a short time.
